name: Equipment or asset failure breaks the flow
description: A piece of equipment, workstation, or physical asset interrupts the operating rhythm enough to change timing, routing, or output quality.
source_ref: universal-signal-gold-set-01: equipment or asset breaks flow expressed through restaurant live operations
evidence_types: equipment failure forces a routing or pacing change
station output drops because an asset is unreliable
service timing shifts around a broken or degraded asset
